bbc_core/bbc_scalar.py.description: Implements the BBCScalar class, state multiplication tables, and OmegaOperator self-heal protocols.

bbc_core/matrix_ops.py.description: Calculates matrix operations, Gauss-Jordan inversion, pseudo-inverse, and condition numbers.

bbc_core/hmpu_core.py.description: HMPU Governor central mathematical governor implementing dC/dt, grad A, P_t+1, and F_perp.

bbc_core/hmpu_engine.py.description: Coordinates the recipe execution pipeline and dynamic constraint updates based on Aura metrics.

bbc_core/verifier.py.description: Enforces code syntax checking across 11+ programming languages and validates workspace symbol boundaries.

bbc_core/symbol_extractor.py.description: Extracts classes, functions, and imports from codebase abstract syntax trees.

bbc_core/symbol_graph.py.description: Parses and maintains the dependency graph of all symbols in the workspace.

bbc_core/change_tracker.py.description: Analyzes git-style diffs and tracks structural edits in code files.

bbc_core/impact_analyzer.py.description: Calculates the impact factor of changes and predicts perturbation vectors.

bbc_core/context_optimizer.py.description: Applies compression targets and rules to minimize token payloads.

bbc_core/context_compiler.py.description: Compiles raw context chunks into structured schemas for AI digestion.

bbc_core/semantic_packer.py.description: Packs files and text segments based on semantic similarity ratings.

bbc_core/hmpu_indexer.py.description: Handles local indexing for prompt-response and embedding mapping.

bbc_core/hmpu_quantizer.py.description: Quantizes embeddings into low-bit space for efficient local storage.

bbc_core/realtime_token_counter.py.description: Live token counter using tiktoken library.

bbc_core/scan_profile.py.description: Iterates files dynamically based on inclusion/exclusion lists.

bbc_core/project_hygiene.py.description: Performs checks for unused imports, styling, and coding hygiene.

bbc_core/attribution_tracer.py.description: Traces file modifications back to their originators (git authors or agents).

bbc_core/adaptive_mode.py.description: Enforces Strict/Relaxed mode bounds and scans inputs for speculative language.

bbc_core/hallucination_guard.py.description: Performs post-generation symbol checking and identifies hallucinated code calls.

bbc_core/auto_patcher.py.description: Constructs and applies auto-correcting code patches based on CVP feedback.

bbc_core/auto_detector.py.description: Monitors terminal activity and automatically adapt projects.

bbc_core/ai_integration.py.description: Intercepts AI requests, starts counters, and updates context JSON.

bbc_core/agent_adapter.py.description: Transforms context snapshots into markdown, YAML, or XML formats for specific IDE tools.

bbc_core/adapter.py.description: Central interface adapters for system inputs.

bbc_core/native_adapter.py.description: Bridges Python subprocess executions to OS filesystem and terminal operations.

bbc_core/ide_hooks.py.description: Listens for editor selection, change, and file open hooks.

bbc_core/ide_auto_config.py.description: Generates workspace configurations for specific IDE plugins.

bbc_core/git_hooks.py.description: Installs and triggers pre-commit or post-commit git hooks.

bbc_core/config.py.description: Central settings manager loaded from .env or JSON configs.

bbc_core/bbc_logger.py.description: Initializes and configures the standard bbc logger formatter.

bbc_core/telemetry.py.description: Structured JSON-L event logger monitoring heal, degenerate, and commands.

bbc_core/state_manager.py.description: Singleton tracking session budgets, active statuses, and telemetry events.

bbc_core/http_server.py.description: Serves a JSON-RPC HTTP server for external tools.

bbc_core/memory_store.py.description: SQLite database interface for embedding vector storage.

bbc_core/global_menu.py.description: Interactive curses CLI menu. Superseded by automated RPC/HTTP servers.

bbc_core/global_setup.py.description: Manual CLI environment setup router. Replaced by automated installers.

bbc.py.description: Command line entrypoint for the legacy bbc tool.

bbc_daemon.py.description: Runs background daemon loop monitoring workspace activity.

run_bbc.py.description: Runner script redirecting parameters directly to CLI router.
